title: apocynum venetum subsp. tauricum
intro: Apocynum venetum subsp. tauricum, also known as Caucasian dogbane, is a plant species within the dogbane family (Apocynaceae) native to the Caucasus region. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including diuretic and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Apocynum venetum subsp. tauricum include its potential to help with conditions such as hypertension, edema, and skin infections, due to its ability to promote urination and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in infusions, tinctures, or topically applied as a cream to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
